name: reposcout
description: Use a separate read-only Pi scout to map repository context.

interface.shortDescription: Find relevant repo files before broad search.
interface.longDescription: Adds a portable RepoScout MCP server. DeepSeek Flash/high is the fast default, Luna/xhigh is the accuracy tier, and credentials remain local runtime configuration.
defaultPrompt: Use RepoScout to find the files for this bug.
Ask RepoScout for relevant context before searching.
Find where this behavior is implemented.
